test_frameworks.name: pytest (shared)
test_frameworks.scope: Shared Python tests. Default unit run: cd lib && uv run pytest. Technology-backed integration runs use explicit paths under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.

test_frameworks.name: pytest (ddl-mcp)
test_frameworks.scope: DDL MCP tests. Default unit run: cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest. Live backend coverage runs against top-level tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ paths from the ddl-mcp project env.

test_frameworks.name: promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: LLM eval harness in tests/evals/ for migration skills and command testing. Run via: cd tests/evals && npm run eval

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Single unified plugin with commands and skills. Loaded via: claude --plugin-dir .

plugin_manifest.description: Plugin manifest for the unified ad-migration plugin.

sandbox_backends.description: Technology-specific sandbox backends for test harness. base.py: abstract SandboxBackend interface. sql_server.py: pyodbc-based SQL Server sandbox lifecycle (schema cloning via SELECT INTO, proc cloning via OBJECT_DEFINITION, scenario execution). oracle.py: oracledb-based Oracle sandbox lifecycle (schema-level via CREATE USER, table cloning via CTAS, proc cloning via ALL_SOURCE, scenario execution with NLS date handling).

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing facade), loader_data.py (data structures for parsed DDL entries), loader_io.py (DDL file I/O), loader_parse.py (control-flow-aware leaf parsing and reference extraction), block_segmenter.py (T-SQL control-flow block segmentation for IF/ELSE, WHILE, TRY/CATCH, BEGIN/END), tsql_utils.py (shared T-SQL masking helpers for routing scans and segmentation), routing.py (T-SQL routing flag detection — all EXEC/control-flow regex patterns and scan_routing_flags(); extracted from catalog.py to break the catalog↔loader_parse circular import), discover.py (catalog-mandatory discover CLI/barrel for list/show/refs and write-back routing), discover_support/ (browse.py for discover list/show/refs logic split out of discover.py), view_analysis.py (sqlglot-based view SQL element extraction — JOINs, CTEs, aggregations, window functions), catalog_writer.py (schema-validated catalog write-back operations — run_write_statements, run_write_scoping, run_write_view_scoping, run_write_source, run_write_table_slice), init.py (migration project scaffolding — SourceConfig registry, run_scaffold_project, run_scaffold_hooks, and FreeTDS verification CLI), freetds.py (Homebrew FreeTDS installation and unixODBC registration checks/repair for SQL Server init), init_templates.py (per-technology template functions for CLAUDE.md, README, .envrc, repo-map, pre-commit hook), catalog.py (catalog JSON I/O — write_table_catalog, write_proc_catalog, write_view_catalog, write_function_catalog per-type writers; load_*_catalog per-type readers; detect_catalog_bucket/detect_object_type catalog resolution helpers; snapshot_enriched_fields/restore_enriched_fields for re-extract field preservation), catalog_models.py (Pydantic v2 models for all catalog types — TableCatalog, ProcedureCatalog, ViewCatalog, FunctionCatalog — plus per-type scoping/profile sections with strict contracts (TableScopingSection, ViewScopingSection, CandidateWriter, SqlElement, DiagnosticsEntry), ScopingSummary batch rollup, shared refactor/test_gen/generate sections, and reference models), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_diff.py (diff-aware classification of catalog objects — hash comparison and unchanged/changed/new/removed classification), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), ddl_hash.py (deterministic DDL hashing — whitespace-normalized SHA-256 for definitions and canonical JSON for table signals), setup_ddl.py (Typer CLI facade for setup-ddl commands), setup_ddl_core.py (thin compatibility barrel for setup-ddl public entrypoints), setup_ddl_support/ (split setup-ddl internals — manifest.py for technology/manifest/source-identity logic, staging.py for staging JSON normalization, catalog_write.py for diff-aware catalog writes and stale marking, extract.py for live extraction, source discovery, and end-to-end run_extract), sqlserver_extract.py (direct pyodbc extraction for SQL Server — all 13 catalog signal queries, DMF reference queries via Python loop; called by run_extract), oracle_extract.py (direct oracledb extraction for Oracle — DBMS_METADATA DDL, ALL_TAB_COLUMNS, ALL_CONSTRAINTS, ALL_DEPENDENCIES; called by run_extract), migrate.py (migrate CLI/barrel for context, write, write-catalog, and render-unit-tests commands), migrate_support/ (derivation, context assembly, and artifact/render helpers split out of migrate.py), profile.py (profiling context assembly + write-back CLI), refactor.py (refactor CLI/barrel for context and write commands plus compatibility exports), refactor_support/ (diffing.py for symmetric diff helpers, context.py for refactor context assembly, writeback.py for refactor validation and catalog writes split out of refactor.py), refactor_error_codes.md (canonical `/refactor` surfaced-code contract shared by the command and skill), test_harness.py (test-harness CLI/barrel for sandbox lifecycle, compare-sql, write, and validate-review commands), test_harness_support/ (manifest/backend resolution, scenario execution, catalog write, and review validation helpers split out of test_harness.py), dry_run.py (migrate-util CLI facade; subcommands: status, ready, batch-plan, exclude, sync-excluded-warnings), dry_run_core.py (migrate-util readiness, status collation, exclusion mutation, and excluded-dependency warning reconciliation), batch_plan.py (migrate-util batch-plan subcommand — Kahn's topological batch scheduler, catalog enumeration, output assembly; splits tables into source_tables/source_pending/pipeline buckets; output contract: output_models.BatchPlanOutput), deps.py (transitive dependency traversal — collect_deps, _expand_view_refs, _expand_proc_refs, dbt model detection helpers), pipeline_status.py (pipeline stage status and diagnostics — object_pipeline_status, collect_object_diagnostics, _compute_status_and_diagnostics with deduplication), runtime_config.py and runtime_config_models.py (typed manifest/runtime contract for independent source, target, sandbox, and extraction sections), target_setup.py (target-schema resolution plus target-mapped sources.yml orchestration), dbops/ (technology-specific database operation adapters for SQL Server, Oracle, and DuckDB plus fixture materialization script resolution), generate_sources.py (generate-sources CLI — reads catalog/tables/, includes only is_source: true tables in sources.yml, supports target source-schema remapping, reports unconfirmed/excluded/incomplete lists; --write writes dbt/models/staging/sources.yml, --strict fails on incomplete scoping), env_config.py (git-repo assertion, project-root/dbt-path/ddl-dir/catalog-dir resolution with env-var overrides), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization), db_connect.py (public sql_server_connect + oracle_connect connection factories — shared by setup_ddl, sqlserver_extract, oracle_extract), context_helpers.py (shared catalog context loaders: load_table_profile, load_proc_statements, load_proc_body, load_table_columns, collect_source_tables, sandbox_metadata, load_test_spec — used by migrate.py, refactor_support/context.py), cli_utils.py (shared emit function for JSON stdout output — used by all CLI modules), output_models/ (domain-split Pydantic output contract package with compatibility barrel at shared.output_models), diagnostics/ (extensible diagnostic registry with decorator-based check registration, two-pass runner, and cross-dialect checks — __init__.py: registry + runner + CLI, common.py: 11 cross-dialect checks, sqlserver.py: 8 SQL Server dialect-specific checks, oracle.py: Oracle-specific checks (LONG_TRUNCATION, PACKAGE_MEMBER, PIPELINED_FUNCTION); materialized_views bucket supported across known FQNs, object buckets, and reference resolution).

output_contracts.description: Pydantic v2 models (extra=forbid) for CLI output contracts, split by domain with a compatibility barrel at shared.output_models. Catalog input contracts live in catalog_models.py.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body. ddl_mcp_support/ contains the standalone loader/env/name-resolution support slice copied into the MCP package so its lockfile no longer depends on the broader editable shared runtime package.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: listing-objects/ (catalog browsing — list objects by type), analyzing-table/ (scoping — auto-detects table vs view; tables: writer discovery, procedure analysis, statement resolution; views: SQL element extraction, call tree, logic summary), generating-model/ (dbt model generation from refactored SQL, staging + mart split), profiling-table/ (profiling — auto-detects table vs view; tables: 6 questions including classification, PK, watermark, FKs, PII; views: stg/mart classification; references/ contains classification guides for fact_accumulating_snapshot and fact_periodic_snapshot disambiguation), generating-tests/ (single-table and view-backed test generation with fixture synthesis, write-through test_harness persistence, and mixed prompt support), reviewing-tests/ (LLM quality gate for test specs and review-result validation across table and view scenarios), test-invariants/ (shared generator-reviewer contract for branch authority, cross-artifact consistency, and narrow repair), reviewing-model/ (dbt model review with structured feedback, stable reference codes, and acknowledgements protocol; references/ contains style guidelines), refactoring-sql/ (CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), git-checkpoints/ (git checkpoint management during long-running agent tasks). _shared/references/dialects/ contains dialect-specific references (tsql/ and oracle/) for statement classification and routine migration patterns; skills read dialect from manifest.json to select the right file.

migration_commands.description: Stage-specific commands: setup-ddl.md (DDL extraction from live source systems with catalog signals, DMF references, and AST enrichment; also enriches view catalogs with sql+columns fields), scope.md (writer discovery), profile.md (migration profiling — routes tables to profiling-table, views/MVs to profiling-view), setup-target.md (target runtime collection, dbt project scaffolding, and target-mapped sources.yml generation), generate-model.md (dbt model generation), status.md (migration status dashboard — calls migrate-util status CLI for collated stage statuses, interprets results with LLM), init-ad-migration.md (prerequisite checker and installer), setup-sandbox.md (create throwaway sandbox execution environment), teardown-sandbox.md (drop sandbox runtime), generate-tests.md (multi-table test generation with review loop), refactor.md (SQL CTE restructuring with equivalence audit), exclude-table.md (mark tables or views as excluded from the migration pipeline — sets excluded: true in catalog file, commits change), add-source-tables.md (mark one or more catalog tables as dbt sources with is_source: true; guards require scope to be complete), cleanup-worktrees.md (remove stale git worktrees), commit.md (stage and commit changes with a generated message), commit-push-pr.md (commit, push, and open a pull request in one step). Each is self-contained with sub-agent orchestration, worktree setup, and result summarization.

tests_migration.description: Shared-library unit pytest suite organized by module under tests/unit/<module>/. Shared fixtures that support multiple modules remain under tests/unit/fixtures/. Shared pytest plumbing lives in tests/conftest.py. oracle_mcp_config/ locks the repository Oracle MCP config and install-doc fallback contract.

tests_migration_integration.description: Shared-library integration pytest suite organized by backend and module under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.

tests_evals.description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing against MigrationTest schema. Per-scenario fixtures live under fixtures/<package>/<scenario-slug>/; runnable configs live in packages/ plus the oracle-regression/, oracle-live/, and mssql-live/ package roots. Assertions live under tests/evals/assertions/, including schema-helpers.js for shared path and term handling. No top-level Promptfoo config — npm run eval chains the package configs.

tests_ddl_mcp.description: DDL MCP pytest suite. Unit coverage lives under mcp/ddl/tests/unit/. Live backend coverage lives under top-level tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ and runs from the ddl-mcp project env.

scripts.description: Developer scripts: worktree.sh (single entrypoint for worktree creation/attach plus bootstrap and structured failure output), publish-sqlserver-image.sh (build + push SQL Server Docker image with pre-baked KimballFixture data files; MigrationTest stays a schema-level runtime materialization concern), demo-warehouse/ (cross-dialect Kimball demo warehouse fixture for demos, parity checks, and image builds).

docker_sqlserver.description: Dockerfile for SQL Server test image. Pins a specific CU tag and COPYs pre-built MDF/LDF data files so KimballFixture is immediately available on docker run; the canonical MigrationTest fixture is materialized later as a schema inside the configured SQL Server database. data/ is ephemeral (gitignored) — produced by scripts/publish-sqlserver-image.sh during the build.

docs.description: Documentation. docs/design/README.md defines the keep criteria for durable agent-facing design notes. docs/reference/ contains operator and contributor docs.

test_fixtures.description: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture for integration testing and demos. schema/ has DDL for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL (staging, dim, fact, gold tables + views). data/baseline/ has seed INSERT SQL per dialect (extracted from AdventureWorks2022). data/delta/ has 5 incremental scenarios (new-customer-product, scd2-address-change, scd1-name-correction, late-arriving-fact, dedup-staging). procedures/ has 20-21 stored procedures per dialect covering 11 pattern categories (standard load, CTE, join, set ops, subquery, aggregate, pivot, control flow, exec chain, view-backed, error conditions). scripts/ has csv_to_inserts.py (extraction + generation tool). parity/ has validate.py (cross-dialect parity validation script — runs full orchestrator on sql-test/oracle-test/pg-test and compares all 20 output tables across baseline and 5 delta rounds) and coverage-matrix.md (procedure → pattern category mapping).

key_directories..claude-plugin/: Claude Code plugin manifest at the repository root
key_directories.commands/: Claude Code command specs at the repository root
key_directories.skills/: Claude Code skills at the repository root
key_directories.lib/: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
key_directories.lib/shared/schemas/: JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/unit/: Shared-library unit pytest suite organized by module under tests/unit/<module>/.
key_directories.tests/integration/: Shared-library integration pytest suite organized by backend and module under tests/integration/<technology>/<module>/.
key_directories.tests/integration/scoping-inputs/: JSON fixture inputs for scoping-logic tests and regressions.
key_directories.tests/evals/: Promptfoo eval harness for skill and command testing (skill packages include listing-objects, profiling-table, generating-model, generating-tests, reviewing-tests, reviewing-model, analyzing-table, analyzing-table-readiness; command packages include cmd-scope, cmd-profile, cmd-generate-model, cmd-generate-tests, cmd-refactor, cmd-status, cmd-reset-migration, cmd-commit-push-pr)
key_directories.mcp/ddl/tests/: DDL MCP pytest suite split into tests/unit/ plus shared top-level backend coverage under tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/ executed from the ddl-mcp project env.
key_directories.mcp/ddl/ddl_mcp_support/: Standalone support slice for the DDL MCP package: local env/path helpers, name normalization, and DDL loader/parser logic copied from the shared runtime to keep the MCP dependency boundary narrow.
key_directories.scripts/demo-warehouse/: Cross-dialect Kimball DW fixture: schema DDL, baseline seed data, and delta scenarios for SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL
key_directories.docs/design/: Durable agent-facing design notes only; keep criteria are documented in docs/design/README.md
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules such as coding-conventions, git-workflow, logging-policy, and codex-execution-policy
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for repo-local Claude Code skills

commands.init_check_freetds: cd lib && uv run init check-freetds [--register-missing]
commands.test_harness_execute_spec: cd lib && uv run test-harness execute-spec --spec <path>
commands.migrate_util_status: cd lib && uv run migrate-util status [<fqn>]
commands.migrate_util_ready: cd lib && uv run migrate-util ready <stage> [--object <fqn>]
commands.migrate_util_exclude: cd lib && uv run migrate-util exclude <fqn> [fqn ...]
commands.migrate_util_reset_migration: cd lib && uv run migrate-util reset-migration <scope|profile|test-gen|refactor> <fqn> [fqn ...]
commands.migrate_util_sync_excluded_warnings: cd lib && uv run migrate-util sync-excluded-warnings
commands.refactor_context: cd lib && uv run refactor context --table <schema.table>
commands.refactor_write: cd lib && uv run refactor write --table <schema.table> --refactored-sql-file <path> --status ok|partial|error
commands.compare_sql: cd lib && uv run test-harness compare-sql --sql-a-file <extracted.sql> --sql-b-file <refactored.sql> --spec <spec-path>

conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-dir . CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the repository root.
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Two pytest suites: (1) shared lib — default unit run: cd lib && uv run pytest; path-scoped runs: ../tests/unit/<module> and ../tests/integration/<technology>/<module>. (2) DDL MCP server — default unit run: cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest; live backend runs target ../../../tests/integration/<technology>/ddl_mcp/.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever any entry here becomes stale, especially after architecture, entrypoint, command, module, package, test/eval layout, or documentation-index changes.
